hero_subtitle: Soven Liaisoning Services bridges entrepreneurs, investors, and corporations with Government & Regulatory authorities across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh, offering end-to-end support for real estate, project facilitation, approvals, and strategic business growth with professionalism and integrity.
about_p1: Soven Liaisoning Services was incorporated in 1998 and is currently based in Hyderabad. We have been associated with many multi-nationals for the successful completion of their projects in Telangana & Andhra Pradesh.
about_p2: Before the liberalization of Government Policies, there was a great scarcity of experienced professionals with immense knowledge about local Regulatory & Statutory Rules. This led many Multi-national Organizations to step back or face delays in approvals — affecting their profitability and business opportunity.
about_quote: Taking advantage of Government policies requires not just knowledge, but the ability to leave a positive impression on government stakeholders. Only Seasoned and Intelligent Professionals can render these services.

projects.title: Apex Meadows
projects.description: Regulatory clearances and land conversion approvals for a premium upscale residential villas township in Kokapet, Hyderabad.

projects.title: Asian Cinemas
projects.description: Liaisoning and fire disaster approvals for modern multiplex screens and retail zones in Hyderabad.

projects.title: BITS Pilani Hyderabad Campus
projects.description: End-to-end liaison services for BITS Pilani campus development, including environmental clearances and building permits.

projects.title: Sandhya Hotels
projects.description: Statutory approvals, building plans scrutiny, and occupancy certificate for a premium luxury hotel property in Gachibowli.

projects.title: Sarath City Capital Mall
projects.description: Complete GHMC and HMDA development clearances for Hyderabad's landmark 8-storey shopping mall.

projects.title: Skill Promoters (IT Office & Mall)
projects.description: Clearances and statutory coordination for a futuristic IT office tower and shopping cum multiplex development.

projects.title: Wipro IT Services
projects.description: Industrial clearances, power supply sanctions, and PCB operating consents for Wipro IT Development centers.
